case_title: KIEU D. HONG RESPONDENT VS. COCHRANE,RICHARD DBA COCHRANE & CHOI COLLEGE OF BE et al APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2003 - CONTINUED TO NOV-06-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 525 PARTIES STIPULATE THAT RICHARD COCHRANE WILL PAY KIEU D. HONG $5000 + $22 FOR A TOTAL OF $5022. SAID AMOUNT IS PAYABLE AS FOLLOWS: $2511 IS DUE BY 10-02-03; THE REMAINING $2511 IS DUE BY 10-18-03. IF THERE IS NO COMPLIANCE WITH THIS AGREEMENT, KIEU D. HONG MAY TAKE JUDGMENT AGAINST RICHARD COCHRANE AT COMPLIANCE DATE CURRENTLY SET FOR NOVEMBER 6, 2003 IN DEPARTMENT 525 AT 9 A.M.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2003 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 6, 2003 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID H. FLEISIG; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-525, THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 6, 2003).

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2003 - JUDGMENT IS ORDERED FOR PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT MS. KIEU D. HONG AND AGAINST APPELLANT/DEFENDANT RICHARD COCHRANE DBA COCHRANE & CHOI COLLEGE OF BEAUTY, ET AL FOR $5,000.00 AND $0.00 ATTORNEY FEES AND $22.00 COSTS. NOTE: NO APPEARANCE BY APPELLANT/DEFENDANT. AS PER PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT, THE STIPULATED SETTLEMENT NOT PAID. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. JUDGE: JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID H. FLEISIG; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-525, THURS., 06NOV2003).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT HONG, KIEU D. RECOVER FROM APPELLANT COCHRANE,RICHARD DBA COCHRANE & CHOI COLLEGE OF BE AUTY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,022.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT COCHRANE,RICHARD DBA COCHRANE & CHOI COLLEGE OF BE AUTY CHOI, QUAN HUY DBA COCRANE & CHOI COLLEGE OF BEAUT AS TO RESPONDENT HONG, KIEU D. HEARING SET FOR SEP-18-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED.
MINUTES FOR NOV-06-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED.
